rule_metadata.name: Contains_PE_File
rule_metadata.author: Didier Stevens (https://DidierStevens.com)
rule_metadata.description: Detect a PE file inside a byte sequence
rule_metadata.method: Find string MZ followed by string PE at the correct offset (AddressOfNewExeHeader)

rules.rule_text:
rule Contains_PE_File
{
	meta:
		author = "Didier Stevens (https://DidierStevens.com)"
		description = "Detect a PE file inside a byte sequence"
		method = "Find string MZ followed by string PE at the correct offset (AddressOfNewExeHeader)"

	strings:
		$a = "MZ"

	condition:
		for any i in ( 1 .. #a ) : ( uint32( @a [ i ] + uint32( @a [ i ] + 0x3C ) ) == 0x00004550 )
}
